ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false ,AND( NOT(OR( $Profile.Name = "CFG -Distressed Team Lead", $Profile.Name = "CFG-Distressed ParaLegal Only", $Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $Permission.Refer_to_Legal_Approve_Reject_Access )), ISCHANGED(Refer_to_Legal__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL( Refer_to_Legal__c , 'Approved') , ISPICKVAL( Refer_to_Legal__c , 'Declined') ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Para-Legal or Team-Lead can approve or decline the status.
